questions.question: What is the man in the white shirt holding and demonstrating?
questions.answer_key: A small insect or specimen, appears to be holding it between his fingers
questions.rationale: Main action and object central to understanding the video's purpose and content

questions.question: What type of setting or location is shown in most of the frames?
questions.answer_key: A laboratory or scientific workspace with equipment, tanks, and workstations
questions.rationale: Setting establishes context for the demonstration and helps orient the listener

questions.question: What is visible on the wooden board or surface in one of the frames?
questions.answer_key: Papers, documents, and sticky notes with writing or markings on them
questions.rationale: Shows documentation or record-keeping typical of scientific work environments

questions.question: How many people are clearly visible as the main focus throughout the video?
questions.answer_key: One man, the primary subject demonstrating or presenting the specimen
questions.rationale: Clarifies that this is a single-person demonstration or presentation

questions.question: What is the man's apparent role or activity in this setting?
questions.answer_key: Scientist or researcher demonstrating or explaining a specimen to an audience
questions.rationale: Establishes the man's professional context and the nature of the activity
